Rules.InvariantScript: "Finishing the job will change its status to completed and upload measurements information.  Are you sure you want to proceed?"
locLeadTestPerformed And (gblRecordJobCurrent.'Lead Test: Send Document?'=gblOptionSets.Job.LeadTestSendDocuments.Yes Or IsBlank(gblRecordJobCurrent.'Lead Test: Last Sent Date'))
Set(gblRecordJobCurrent,Patch(colCdsJobs, LookUp(colCdsJobs, appJobIDText=gblRecordJobCurrent.appJobIDText), {'Lead Test: Send Document?': 'Lead Test: Send Document? (Jobs)'.No}));
Set(gblRecordJobCurrent,Patch(colCdsJobs, LookUp(colCdsJobs, appJobIDText=gblRecordJobCurrent.appJobIDText), {'Lead Test: Send Document?': 'Lead Test: Send Document? (Jobs)'.Yes}));

Rules.InvariantScript:
Table(
{Title: "Homeowner", Icon: Icon.Home, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Rooms", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Labour", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Materials", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Signatures", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Summary", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Final Steps", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Notes", Icon: Icon.Note, Screen: App.ActiveScreen}
)

ControlPropertyState.AutoRuleBindingString:
Table(
{Title: "Homeowner", Icon: Icon.Home, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Rooms", Icon: Icon.People},
{Title: "Labour", Icon: Icon.People},
{Title: "Materials", Icon: Icon.People},
{Title: "Signatures", Icon: Icon.People},
{Title: "Summary", Icon: Icon.People},
{Title: "Final Steps", Icon: Icon.People}
)
If(Self.Layout = Layout.Horizontal, Min(280, Self.Width - 60), Min(280, Self.Height - 60))

Rules.InvariantScript:
Switch(
    ThisItem.Item,
    "Rooms",
    Navigate(
        'Rooms Screen',
        BorderStyle.None
    ),
    "Labor",
    Navigate(
        'Labor Screen',
        BorderStyle.None
    ),
    "Materials",
    Navigate(
        'Materials Screen',
        BorderStyle.None
    ),
    "Documents",
    Navigate(
        'Documents Screen',
        BorderStyle.None
    ),
    "Overview",
    Navigate(
        'Overview Screen',
        BorderStyle.None
    ),
    "Elevation Photos",
    With(
        {
            varElevationCount: CountRows(
                Filter(
                    colCdsJobPhotos,
                    colCdsJobPhotos[@Job].Job = gblRecordJobCurrent.Job,
                    Type in [
                        gblOptionSets.Global.PhotoType.ElevationFront,
                        gblOptionSets.Global.PhotoType.ElevationRear,
                        gblOptionSets.Global.PhotoType.ElevationSide
                    ]
                )
            )
        },
        Navigate(
            'Photos Screen',
            ScreenTransition.None,
            {
                locModeElevation: true,
                locModeDefault: false,
                locModeWindow: false,
                locShowTypes: varElevationCount = 0,
                locShowPhotos: varElevationCount > 0,
                locAddPhotoLabel: "",
                locReturnScreen: 'Final Steps Screen'
            }
        )
    )
)
